title: Netherite Flight Armor
description: The ultimate late-game gear. Combine your Netherite Chestplate with an Elytra at an anvil to achieve high protection and infinite flight.
body:
Netherite Flight Armor is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly mod designed for players who are tired of switching between their Elytra and their chestplate. Now, you can have the best of both worlds: the unbreakable protection of Netherite and the freedom of the skies.

✨ Features
The Netherite Winged Chestplate: A new tier of armor that provides full Netherite protection while functioning exactly like an Elytra.

Anvil Fusion: No complicated crafting tables. Just take your Netherite Chestplate and an Elytra to an anvil and forge them together.

Enchantment Friendly: Keeps the spirit of the game by allowing standard armor and Elytra enchantments (Unbreaking, Mending, etc.).

**You need: Fabric-api for 26.1.2.**
